name: Rotelle with Provencal Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 large Ripe tomatoes, cut into Small cubes
2 Jarred roasted red bell Peppers, diced
8 Olives, such as Kalamata, Coarsely chopped
1 medium Clove garlic, peeled and Forced through a press
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomatoes, vinegar, olive oil, bell peppers, capers, anchovies, olives, garlic, thyme, basil, salt and several grindings of black pepper. Marinate while cooking the pasta.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boil, add the pasta and cook according to package directions. Drain and add the sauce, tossing to coat. Serve.
